specifications: Efficiency 1 The efficiency of the element is shown using the Micron (µ) and Beta (β) ratings. The micron rating indicates the size of the particle being filtered and the beta rating the efficiency
calculated as 1/β. E.g. a rating of β200 will be 99.5% efficient whereas β1000 would be 99.9%.: 10µ

When you order from FilterFinder, you can trust that you are getting a reliable and high-quality replacement filter that will keep your system running smoothly.

variants.title: HiFi Filter SH 67814 Pressure Filter | Replaces the Eppensteiner 20018G10A000P
variants.description: Genuine HiFi Filter SH 67814. This part is designed to meet high-performance standards, offering reliability and durability across a wide range of applications. Manufactured with precision and quality materials, it ensures optimal compatibility and functionality within your system, helping to maintain efficiency and extend the lifespan of your equipment. Whether used as part of a filtration system, hydraulic setup, or general machinery, this component delivers consistent performance under demanding conditions. Its robust construction and dependable design make it a trusted choice for maintaining system integrity and reducing downtime.
